title: Multimodality PET and Near-Infrared Fluorescence Intraoperative Imaging of CEA-Positive Colorectal Cancer.
author: Lwin TM Minnix M Li L Sherman A Hong T Wong JYC Olafsen T Poku E Bouvet M Fong Y Shively JE Yazaki PJ
content:
S-EPMC10333401 PMC10333401 Multimodality PET and Near-Infrared Fluorescence Intraoperative Imaging of CEA-Positive Colorectal Cancer.

Purpose

Molecular imaging is a major diagnostic component for cancer management, enabling detection, staging of disease, targeting therapy, and monitoring
